response:
The flight departs Atlanta at 10:00:00 local time on 2024-03-01.
Atlanta is in the Eastern Standard Time (EST) zone, which is UTC-5, as Daylight Saving Time does not start until March 10, 2024.
So, 2024-03-01 10:00:00 EST is equivalent to 2024-03-01 15:00:00 UTC (10:00 + 5 hours).

Wait, 10:00 EST is UTC-5. So 10:00 EST = 10:00 - 5 hours = 05:00 UTC.
Let me correct this.
Departure in UTC: 2024-03-01 10:00:00 EST - 5 hours = 2024-03-01 05:00:00 UTC.

The flight duration is 11 hours.
Arrival in UTC: 2024-03-01 05:00:00 UTC + 11 hours = 2024-03-01 16:00:00 UTC.

Paris is in the Central European Time (CET) zone, which is UTC+1, as Daylight Saving Time does not start until March 31, 2024.
Arrival in Paris local time: 2024-03-01 16:00:00 UTC + 1 hour = 2024-03-01 17:00:00 CET.

Exact arrival time and date in Paris local time:
2024-03-01 17:00:00
